channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bollard knocked over and lying on grass verge, 15th March
item.description:
In front of 1 Hillview Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hill View Road, Battledown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Abandoned Caravan, 15th March
item.description:
Another abandoned caravan in the area. Recommend trying to track down the people doing this. This has been the 4th this year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair dumped on road, been there about five days and not reported., 15th March
item.description:
New Road, Southam at junction with access to road to former Haymes Mushroom Farm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in the road. Damaged cars and buses, 15th March
item.description:
Opposite 24-28 Pennine road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Pennine Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flags erected on lampposts, 15th March
item.description:
On the lampposts next to the junction of Evesham Road and Wellington by No 38 hotel
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 15th March
item.description:
Long pothole in centre of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40G, Dunalley Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More broken glass on Honeybourne Line, 15th March
item.description:
Thanks for doing such a thorough and timely cleanup following race week. Unfortunately there is still some broken glass here. Please clean up carefully as this is a main cycle route. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne Way, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Series of potholes, 15th March
item.description:
Series of potholes which have been worsening for months and still haven't been fixed. Have you ever thought of patrolling your roads to prevent this?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep, dangerous abd damaging pothole, 15th March
item.description:
Severe pothole opposite White Hart pub on southbound carriageway of A417.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ermine Way, Birdlip, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign broken off and no clear route, 15th March
item.description:
Sign broken off at either end of field Horses in field Manure at one end of path No pedestrians gates Unclear route

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing sign and path overgrown, 15th March
item.description:
Sign missing and path overgrown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes on the side of the road, 15th March
item.description:
Along the verge… potholes are very large and deep

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence collapsing causing potential obstruction, 15th March
item.description:
Public footpath behind bafford approach

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Bafford Approach, Cheltenham

item.title: Dead cat at end of Richmond gardens, 15th March
item.description:
As summary. I can’t see a tag on cat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Richmond Gardens, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diverted traffic sign wants collecting, 15th March
item.description:
In the middle of Tewkesbury Road, Cheltenham on the south east side of the roundabout with Kingsditch Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moat Lane, Tewkesbury

item.title: Warning sign number 117562 for a roundabout ahead is obscured by vegetation coming over the wall, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, New Barn Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
